## What Changed

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Change Type

- [ ] Adds a skill
- [ ] Modifies a skill
- [ ] Updates documentation
- [ ] Changes repository structure
- [ ] Other:

## Workflow And Evidence Fit

- [ ] This follows the workflow-first principle.
- [ ] This follows the evidence-first principle.
- [ ] This avoids duplicating an existing skill, or explains the handoff/overlap clearly.

## Skill Stability

- [ ] No approved skill body was changed.
- [ ] An approved skill body was changed for a targeted reason:

## Public Docs Impact

Do any of these need updates?

- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `SKILL_CATALOG.md`
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md`
- [ ] `EVALUATION.md`
- [ ] No public doc updates needed

## Validation Performed

List checks run, files reviewed, link checks, scenario checks, or other validation.

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out open questions, known limitations, or areas needing closer review.
